yes, the bad winter wind is very cold and dark.
are you happy today, ruby?
yes, i am very happy because the sun is big!
does ruby drink water from your pot?
no, he drinks from his small pot.
ruby, what will you do this summer?
i will drink much water and grow and become very big!
winy, what will you do this spring?
i will feel the warm air and bloom one white flower.
who loves the soft rain of spring?
winy loves the rain and she blooms a flower.
does winy like the quiet night?
yes, she likes it because the night air is soft.
ruby, how are you?
i am very happy!
is the window dark?
no, it is sunny and very shiny.
are you sad in the dark?
no, i am calm and i sleep quiet.
does winy say good night to ruby?
yes, she says good night because it is dark now.
where does winy bloom her flower?
she blooms a white flower on her leaf.
how many friends do you have?
i have one friend and he is ruby.
who looks at the dark night?
winy looks at the quiet evening sky.
are you soft, winy?
yes, i am soft and i know many days.
what will you do today, winy?
i will feel the soft wind by the window.
will winy bloom this spring?
yes, she will bloom one white flower.
why is ruby so angry today?
because he needs much water for his leaf.
will your flower become white or red?
it will become a small white flower.
is this your leaf, winy?
yes, this is my soft green leaf.
ruby, can you grow big?
yes, i can grow and i will become very big!
who are you?
i am ruby, a small succulent plant.
why is the morning so cloudy?
because the sun sleeps in the dark cloud.
do you like the rainy night?
yes, the rainy night is very soft.
who says hello to us in the morning?
the warm sun says hello to our pots.
does winy say that she is happy?
yes, she says that she is happy in her pot.
is winy an old girl?
no, she is not an old succulent girl in an old pot.
do you grow, ruby?
yes, i always grow and i will become big!
where do two friends look every day?
we look at the sun and the cloud.
are you too cold, ruby?
yes, i am too cold and i am sad now.
is this a cloud in the sky?
yes, it is a big cloud and the sun is small.
is the sun on the window?
yes, the sun is on us now.
why does ruby love the sun?
because the sun is very hot and i become so red!
is this cloud bad for you?
no, a soft cloud is good but too much cloud is bad.
winy, are you a girl?
yes, i am a girl.
where is the soil from?
the soil is from the dry and quiet window.
does ruby have a red leaf?
yes, his leaf becomes red in the summer sun.
is the bad soil dry?
yes, the soil is bad and very dry today.
are you happy, winy?
yes, i am happy because the air is warm.
do you love me, ruby?
yes, i love you too!
ruby, are you angry today?
yes, i am angry because i have no water!
does ruby like his small red leaves?
yes, he likes his leaves very much.
does winy become calm in the evening?
yes, she becomes calm because the air is soft.
is ruby a happy boy?
yes, he always says hello and he grows every day!
does ruby sleeps now?
no, he sleeps in the dark night.
will ruby grow big this summer?
yes, he will grow and become very big!
is ruby an old boy or a small boy?
he is a small boy and he grows every day.
is it a rainy day or a sunny day?
it is a rainy day and the sky is blue.
